name: Geneva Pear Flan (Geneve)
recipeIngredient: 8 Pears, ripe, peeled and cut into thin strips or grated with a coarse grater
50 g Lemon Peel, candied, cut into small dice
50 g Orange Peel, candied, cut into small dice
recipeInstructions:
The units: 100 g or 1/2 oz; 1 dl or 1/2 fl oz; 24 cm or 1/2 in
Line a 24 cm wide flan ring with the pastry and prick well with a fork. Mix the sugar, cinnamon, and flour thoroughly and sprinkle onto the pastry base. Mix the pear slices, lemon and orange peel, raisins, and oil together, then spread on top. Moisten the mixture with the white wine (all or part of the wine, depending on the amount of pear juice in the flan ring). Sprinkle with brown sugar and cover with cream. Bake for 30-35 minutes at 220°C. Loosen the sides of the flan and let cool; turn out when cold. Serve cold.
